title: Feedstock Preparation
summary: Preparation of spirit and ingredients prior to blending or packaging.
purpose: To ensure all feedstock materials meet quality and production requirements.
prerequisites: Approved production order and released ingredients.
safety_notes: Observe alcohol handling procedures and safe manual handling practices.

steps.title: Review Production Schedule
steps.body: Confirm product, quantity and required completion date.

steps.title: Verify Ingredient Availability
steps.body: Confirm sufficient stock exists for the planned batch.

steps.title: Inspect Ingredients
steps.body: Check appearance, integrity and batch identification.

steps.title: Prepare Spirit
steps.body: Confirm spirit strength and quantity meet production requirements.

steps.title: Stage Ingredients
steps.body: Move approved materials to the designated production area.

steps.title: Record Material Usage
steps.body: Issue materials to the work order in VNDManuf.

risks.prevention: Verify all materials against the production order.

troubleshooting: Escalate shortages or discrepancies before commencing production.

title: Proofing Spirit
summary: Procedure for measuring and adjusting alcohol strength.
purpose: To ensure spirit meets target ABV specifications.
prerequisites: Calibrated testing equipment and approved batch.
safety_notes: Alcohol is flammable. Keep away from ignition sources.

steps.title: Collect Representative Sample
steps.body: Take a sample from a well-mixed vessel.

steps.title: Measure Temperature
steps.body: Record sample temperature for correction calculations.

steps.title: Measure ABV
steps.body: Use approved instruments and procedures.

steps.title: Compare to Specification
steps.body: Determine whether adjustment is required.

steps.title: Adjust Strength
steps.body: Add approved water or spirit as required.

steps.title: Re-Test
steps.body: Confirm final specification is achieved.

troubleshooting: If repeat readings vary significantly, verify instrument calibration.

title: Sampling Procedures
summary: Collection of representative samples for quality control.
purpose: To ensure accurate quality assessment and traceability.
safety_notes: Use PPE and avoid contamination of product.

steps.title: Prepare Sampling Equipment
steps.body: Ensure all containers and tools are clean.

steps.title: Identify Batch
steps.body: Confirm batch number and product details.

steps.title: Collect Sample
steps.body: Obtain a representative sample from the batch.

steps.title: Label Sample
steps.body: Record batch, date and operator details.

steps.title: Perform Testing
steps.body: Conduct required quality assessments.

steps.title: Store Retention Sample
steps.body: Retain samples according to quality procedures.

troubleshooting: Discard and recollect any questionable samples.

title: Cleaning Procedures
summary: General cleaning requirements for production equipment and work areas.
purpose: To maintain hygiene, quality and operational reliability.
safety_notes: Follow SDS requirements and chemical handling procedures.

steps.title: Isolate Equipment
steps.body: Ensure equipment is safe to clean.

steps.title: Remove Product Residues
steps.body: Drain and remove residual materials.

steps.title: Apply Cleaning Solution
steps.body: Use approved concentrations.

steps.title: Rinse Thoroughly
steps.body: Remove all cleaning residues.

steps.title: Inspect Equipment
steps.body: Verify cleanliness before release.

steps.title: Record Completion
steps.body: Complete cleaning records.

risks.prevention: Use PPE and follow SDS instructions.

troubleshooting: Repeat cleaning if residues remain visible.

title: CIP Procedures
purpose: To ensure effective cleaning without equipment disassembly.
prerequisites: Approved CIP chemicals and equipment availability.
safety_notes: Chemical handling hazards exist. Wear appropriate PPE.

steps.title: Prepare System
steps.body: Confirm all connections are secure.

steps.title: Pre-Rinse
steps.body: Flush product residues from the system.

steps.title: Circulate Cleaning Solution
steps.body: Run approved chemical solution for the specified period.

steps.title: Intermediate Rinse
steps.body: Remove cleaning solution.

steps.title: Final Rinse
steps.body: Rinse until chemical residues are eliminated.

steps.title: Verify Cleanliness
steps.body: Inspect and release equipment.

troubleshooting: Repeat CIP cycle if verification requirements are not met.

title: Packaging Line Setup
summary: Preparation of packaging equipment before production.
purpose: To ensure efficient packaging operations and minimise defects.
safety_notes: Beware of moving equipment and pinch points.

steps.title: Review Production Requirements
steps.body: Confirm product and packaging specifications.

steps.title: Perform Line Clearance
steps.body: Remove all previous materials.

steps.title: Verify Components
steps.body: Check bottles, cans, labels and cartons.

steps.title: Set Up Equipment
steps.body: Prepare packaging machinery.

steps.title: Conduct Start-Up Checks
steps.body: Verify quality parameters.

steps.title: Release Line
steps.body: Approve commencement of production.

troubleshooting: Do not start production until all checks are completed.
